mapper.select: select (select count(1) from cook_users where deleted_at is null) as total_users, (select count(1) from cook_recipes where deleted_at is null) as total_recipes, (select count(1) from cook_posts where deleted_at is null) as total_posts, (select count(1) from cook_recipes where deleted_at is null and review_status = 'pending_review') as pending_recipe_count, (select count(1) from cook_posts where deleted_at is null and status = 'pending_review') as pending_post_count, (select count(1) from cook_feedbacks where deleted_at is null and status = 'processing') as processing_feedback_count, (select count(1) from cook_reports where deleted_at is null and status = 'pending') as pending_report_count, (select count(1) from cook_banners where deleted_at is null and status = 'online') as online_banner_count

select date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(1) as value from cook_users where deleted_at is null and created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) group by date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date asc

select r.category_code, coalesce(c.name, r.category_code) as category_name, count(1) as count from cook_recipes r left join cook_categories c on c.category_code collate utf8mb4_general_ci = r.category_code and c.deleted_at is null where r.deleted_at is null group by r.category_code, c.name order by count desc, r.category_code asc
select id, admin_id, biz_type, biz_id, action, remark, created_at from cook_admin_operation_logs order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}

select u.id, u.phone, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.gender, u.region, u.bio, u.status, u.created_at, (select count(1) from cook_recipes r where r.author_id = u.id and r.deleted_at is null) as recipe_count, (select count(1) from cook_posts p where p.user_id = u.id and p.deleted_at is null) as post_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions ci where ci.target_type = 'user' and ci.target_id = u.id and ci.action_type = 'follow' and ci.status = 'active') as follower_count from cook_users u where u.deleted_at is null
and u.status = #{status}
and (u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by u.created_at desc, u.id desc

select u.id, u.phone, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.gender, u.region, u.bio, u.status, u.created_at, (select count(1) from cook_recipes r where r.author_id = u.id and r.deleted_at is null) as recipe_count, (select count(1) from cook_posts p where p.user_id = u.id and p.deleted_at is null) as post_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions ci where ci.target_type = 'user' and ci.target_id = u.id and ci.action_type = 'follow' and ci.status = 'active') as follower_count from cook_users u where u.id = #{id} and u.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cook_user_penalties (user_id, penalty_type, reason, start_at, end_at, operator_id) values (#{userId}, #{penaltyType}, #{reason}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{operatorId})
mapper.select:
select g.id, g.owner_id, u.nickname as owner_nickname, g.conversation_id, g.name, g.avatar_media_id, ma.url as avatar_url, g.intro, g.notice, g.status, g.created_at, (select count(1) from cook_conversation_members cm where cm.conversation_id = g.conversation_id and cm.status = 'normal') as member_count, (select count(1) from cook_messages m where m.conversation_id = g.conversation_id and m.deleted_at is null) as message_count from `cook_groups` g inner join cook_users u on u.id = g.owner_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_media_assets ma on ma.id = g.avatar_media_id and ma.deleted_at is null where g.deleted_at is null
and g.status = #{status}
and (g.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by g.created_at desc, g.id desc

select g.id, g.owner_id, u.nickname as owner_nickname, g.conversation_id, g.name, g.avatar_media_id, ma.url as avatar_url, g.intro, g.notice, g.status, g.created_at, (select count(1) from cook_conversation_members cm where cm.conversation_id = g.conversation_id and cm.status = 'normal') as member_count, (select count(1) from cook_messages m where m.conversation_id = g.conversation_id and m.deleted_at is null) as message_count from `cook_groups` g inner join cook_users u on u.id = g.owner_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_media_assets ma on ma.id = g.avatar_media_id and ma.deleted_at is null where g.id = #{id} and g.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.update: update `cook_groups` set status = 'dissolved', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
